final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining the aesthetic of 大话西游 in 90s 港片 style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic with 胶片颗粒 — exact film stock, grain level, and stylistic execution are yours
Composition: must include a romantic embrace as the focal foreground, two distant figures in the background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 embracing against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, emotionally charged 港片 atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded, filmic direction consistent with 90s 港片 — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a 胶片颗粒 surface treatment — exact grain weight and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be a poster composition; must preserve all four named characters
Avoid:
